# PatchLab documentation

> PatchLab is a modular environment for building audio effects, instruments, and signal-processing systems. The documentation separates current product behavior, edited guidance, DSP learning, and generated registry facts.

- Start here: https://mzajner.github.io/PatchLab-docs/start-here/what-is-patchlab/
- User manual: https://mzajner.github.io/PatchLab-docs/manual/install-and-first-run/
- Build and explore: https://mzajner.github.io/PatchLab-docs/guides/example-library/
- DSP curriculum: https://mzajner.github.io/PatchLab-docs/learn/curriculum/
- Block reference: https://mzajner.github.io/PatchLab-docs/reference/blocks/
- Documentation status: https://mzajner.github.io/PatchLab-docs/reference/documentation-status/

The canonical hostname is approved but pending DNS. These URLs remain the verified publication origin until cutover.
